queries.question: Show the books illustrated by Jane Smith that are either in the young adult or children's age groups.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM AgeGroup JOIN Books ON AgeGroup.ID = Books.AgeGroupID JOIN Illustrator ON Books.IllustratorID = Illustrator.ID
WHERE (AgeGroup.GroupName = "Young Adult Book" OR AgeGroup.GroupName = "Children's Book") AND Illustrator.Fullname = "Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?agegroup a :AgeGroup .
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:hasAgeGroup ?agegroup .
  ?illustrator a :Illustrator .
  ?books p:hasIllustrator ?illustrator .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w2 .
  ?illustrator p:name ?fullname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?groupname_w) = "Young Adult Book" || STR(?groupname_w2) = "Children's Book")) && STR(?fullname_w) = "Jane Smith"))
}

queries.question: Show all the young adult book details, also show the children's books illustrated by Jane Smith.
queries.sql:
SELECT Books.Title 
FROM AgeGroup JOIN Books ON AgeGroup.ID = Books.AgeGroupID JOIN Illustrator ON Books.IllustratorID = Illustrator.ID
WHERE AgeGroup.GroupName = "Young Adult Book" OR AgeGroup.GroupName = "Children's Book" AND Illustrator.Fullname = "Jane Smith"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?agegroup a :AgeGroup .
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:hasAgeGroup ?agegroup .
  ?illustrator a :Illustrator .
  ?books p:hasIllustrator ?illustrator .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w2 .
  ?illustrator p:name ?fullname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?groupname_w) = "Young Adult Book" || (STR(?groupname_w2) = "Children's Book" && STR(?fullname_w) = "Jane Smith")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display the young adult books and children books illustrated by Jane Smith.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?agegroup a :AgeGroup .
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:hasAgeGroup ?agegroup .
  ?illustrator a :Illustrator .
  ?books p:hasIllustrator ?illustrator .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w2 .
  ?illustrator p:name ?fullname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?groupname_w) = "Young Adult Book" || STR(?groupname_w2) = "Children's Book")) && STR(?fullname_w) = "Jane Smith"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?agegroup a :AgeGroup .
  ?books a :Book .
  ?books p:hasAgeGroup ?agegroup .
  ?illustrator a :Illustrator .
  ?books p:hasIllustrator ?illustrator .
  ?books p:Title ?title .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w .
  ?agegroup p:GroupName ?groupname_w2 .
  ?illustrator p:name ?fullname_w .
  FILTER((STR(?groupname_w) = "Young Adult Book" || (STR(?groupname_w2) = "Children's Book" && STR(?fullname_w) = "Jane Smith")))
} }
}
